overall.description: Cinematic aerial footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a slow drone pan across Night City's futuristic skyline. The video features towering skyscrapers with neon advertisements, elevated highways, and distant coastal views under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial district with elevated transit

events.description: begins slow leftward pan across the cityscape

agents.ego_description: operating a drone camera to capture the urban architecture, slowly panning left to reveal the city layout

entered.detail: tall dark skyscrapers featuring large vertical neon advertisements and digital displays
large multi-tiered building with green terraces and stacked architectural design
multi-level highway system curving through the city center with red and green lane markings
tall thin tower structure visible on the horizon beyond the city center
body of water visible in the distant background beyond the urban area

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high aerial view of Night City's commercial district. Black glass towers with vibrant neon billboards dominate the right side, while a distinctive terraced residential complex occupies the left. An elevated highway snakes through the center, leading toward a distant industrial spire on the horizon. The camera begins a slow, steady pan to the left, revealing the coastal water in the far background.

scene_state.functional_zone: central business district with mixed commercial and residential towers

events.description: view shifts from right-side towers to central cityscape as dense skyline emerges on left

agents.ego_description: continuing the leftward aerial pan, maintaining steady altitude while capturing the transition between architectural zones

entered.detail: cluster of various high-rise buildings and skyscrapers forming the dense urban core
massive rectangular advertisement screen displaying commercial content

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues panning left, the black glass towers exit the frame and a dense urban skyline emerges on the left horizon. The terraced residential complex shifts toward the center of the frame, while the elevated highway remains a central visual element. A large horizontal billboard becomes visible in the mid-ground, and the coastal water remains visible in the distant right background.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban core with commercial high-rises

events.description: view settles on left-side cityscape with dense cluster of skyscrapers becoming prominent

agents.ego_description: completing the panoramic sweep across the city, focusing on the dense architectural details of the left-side skyline

entered.detail: distinctive high-rise structure with prominent red neon lighting and signage

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on the dense urban skyline on the left side of the city, with a distinctive red neon building becoming visible. The terraced residential complex has shifted to the right side of the frame, and the elevated highway now curves toward the right edge. The black glass towers have completely exited the view, and the camera captures the full density of the city's commercial core.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial pan across Night City's skyline, shifting from a view of commercial glass towers toward the dense urban core of the city. It begins with a high perspective of black glass towers and vibrant neon billboards on the right, while a terraced residential complex sits to the left and an elevated highway leads toward a distant industrial spire. As the camera steadily pans left, the glass towers exit the frame and the residential complex shifts toward the center, revealing a large horizontal billboard in the mid-ground against a backdrop of distant coastal waters. The scene then expands to focus on the dense urban skyline on the left, where a distinctive red neon building emerges. Finally, the residential complex moves to the right as the highway curves away, fully unveiling the concentrated density of the city's commercial heart.
